name: easy-auto
description: SessionStart + UserPromptSubmit + PreCompact + PostCompact hook — auto-injects the `easy` (friendly) response style as additionalContext so the 7-element pattern (icon · name · alias · plain-line · analogy · ASCII · compare) is active from turn 0 without the user having to call `/easy` first. Reads `${CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT}/styles/easy.<lang>.md` per the user's response language (env `EASY_LANG` override, default `ko`); falls back to `easy.md` (English base) when the lang variant is missing. Implemented in hexa-lang (`_easy_auto.hexa`, invoked via `hexa run`). UserPromptSubmit re-injects every turn so the style never fades; PreCompact + PostCompact preserve it across auto-compaction. Pairs with the `easy` skill (manual `/easy` trigger remains available — easy-auto is the default-on layer). NO opt-out by design (commons @D g11 / sidecar @D s11): `EASY_LANG` only SELECTS the style language (default `ko`) — it is not a disable switch. 0.1.2 removed the `EASY_LANG=off` suppress path that contradicted this. 0.2.0 — 한국어 substring 트리거 '설명'/'쉽게' 추가 (UserPromptSubmit 시 verb/noun/adverb 모든 어형 catch: '설명해'/'설명해줘'/'설명'/'설명서'/'쉽게'/'쉽게 알려줘' 등; 오탐 가능성 수용) + 발동 시 1줄 banner emit ('🎓 easy 모드 활성 — 7-요소 패턴 적용 …'). 기존 inject는 그대로 always-on (trigger gating 아님 — banner만 추가).
